chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3846 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.16041/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 3. 3. For orders on Misc. No.16042/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 15.09.2025. Mr. Hameer Khan Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that he does not press this Petition as the Petitioner would approach the competent Forum in view of the amendments made in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act 2024, providing for Bail Applications to be entertained. As such, the instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed, alongwith Miscellaneous Applications, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
